## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential partnership between GrowthX and Otto for content creation and SEO strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/LTYuV8xxFTX8fUkfQGpzyUeUojHS-RNV?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Otto aims for a GA launch mid-November; seeking to build content assets beforehand](https://fathom.video/share/LTYuV8xxFTX8fUkfQGpzyUeUojHS-RNV?tab=summary&timestamp=1180.0)
  - [GrowthX offers a 2-month strategy sprint ($20K) + ongoing execution ($12-15K/mo)](https://fathom.video/share/LTYuV8xxFTX8fUkfQGpzyUeUojHS-RNV?tab=summary&timestamp=1007.0)
  - [Otto expressed interest in starting ASAP, ideally by Sept 11 (post-Labor Day)](https://fathom.video/share/LTYuV8xxFTX8fUkfQGpzyUeUojHS-RNV?tab=summary&timestamp=1567.0)
  - [GrowthX cautioned on immediate results, emphasizing long-term content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/LTYuV8xxFTX8fUkfQGpzyUeUojHS-RNV?tab=summary&timestamp=1340.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Overview

  - [End-to-end content partner: strategy to CMS publishing](https://fathom.video/share/LTYuV8xxFTX8fUkfQGpzyUeUojHS-RNV?tab=summary&timestamp=260.0)
  - [Team includes ex-TechCrunch editor-in-chief, former Fanatics/TripAdvisor CEO](https://fathom.video/share/LTYuV8xxFTX8fUkfQGpzyUeUojHS-RNV?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)
  - [Founder Marcel's background: content engines at IBM, HP, HashiCorp](https://fathom.video/share/LTYuV8xxFTX8fUkfQGpzyUeUojHS-RNV?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)
  - [AI workflows for efficient, high-quality content creation](https://fathom.video/share/LTYuV8xxFTX8fUkfQGpzyUeUojHS-RNV?tab=summary&timestamp=274.0)

### GrowthX Process

  - [Strategy sprint: 1hr kickoff, bi-weekly/weekly meetings](https://fathom.video/share/LTYuV8xxFTX8fUkfQGpzyUeUojHS-RNV?tab=summary&timestamp=695.0)
  - [Develop artifacts: company context, personas, writing guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/LTYuV8xxFTX8fUkfQGpzyUeUojHS-RNV?tab=summary&timestamp=761.0)
  - [Content OS: Define topic clusters, assignments](https://fathom.video/share/LTYuV8xxFTX8fUkfQGpzyUeUojHS-RNV?tab=summary&timestamp=815.0)
  - [Publish \~30 articles during strategy sprint](https://fathom.video/share/LTYuV8xxFTX8fUkfQGpzyUeUojHS-RNV?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Phase 2: Execute at scale, 10+ articles/week](https://fathom.video/share/LTYuV8xxFTX8fUkfQGpzyUeUojHS-RNV?tab=summary&timestamp=918.0)

### Otto's Current Status and Goals

  - [AI-powered corporate travel assistant in beta for 9 months](https://fathom.video/share/LTYuV8xxFTX8fUkfQGpzyUeUojHS-RNV?tab=summary&timestamp=1157.0)
  - [Targeting GA/press launch mid-November](https://fathom.video/share/LTYuV8xxFTX8fUkfQGpzyUeUojHS-RNV?tab=summary&timestamp=1173.0)
  - [Created \~40 basic Q\&A articles (unpublished) independently](https://fathom.video/share/LTYuV8xxFTX8fUkfQGpzyUeUojHS-RNV?tab=summary&timestamp=1257.0)
  - [Seeking 15-20 more long-form articles before launch](https://fathom.video/share/LTYuV8xxFTX8fUkfQGpzyUeUojHS-RNV?tab=summary&timestamp=1276.0)

### Timeline and Pricing

  - [Strategy sprint: $20K for 6-8 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/LTYuV8xxFTX8fUkfQGpzyUeUojHS-RNV?tab=summary&timestamp=1007.0)
  - [Growth execution: $12-15K/month (likely $12K for Otto)](https://fathom.video/share/LTYuV8xxFTX8fUkfQGpzyUeUojHS-RNV?tab=summary&timestamp=1003.0)
  - [Earliest start date offered: September 22nd](https://fathom.video/share/LTYuV8xxFTX8fUkfQGpzyUeUojHS-RNV?tab=summary&timestamp=1586.0)
  - [Otto prefers earlier start (ideally September 11th)](https://fathom.video/share/LTYuV8xxFTX8fUkfQGpzyUeUojHS-RNV?tab=summary&timestamp=1568.0)

### Expectations Management

  - [GrowthX emphasized no "silver bullet" for immediate results](https://fathom.video/share/LTYuV8xxFTX8fUkfQGpzyUeUojHS-RNV?tab=summary&timestamp=1340.0)
  - [1-2 quarters typically needed for significant traffic/authority increase](https://fathom.video/share/LTYuV8xxFTX8fUkfQGpzyUeUojHS-RNV?tab=summary&timestamp=1356.0)
  - [Otto acknowledged their pre-launch status](https://fathom.video/share/LTYuV8xxFTX8fUkfQGpzyUeUojHS-RNV?tab=summary&timestamp=1398.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send Statement of Work (SoW) document](https://fathom.video/share/LTYuV8xxFTX8fUkfQGpzyUeUojHS-RNV?tab=summary&timestamp=1555.0)
  - [Otto to review SoW and decide on engagement](https://fathom.video/share/LTYuV8xxFTX8fUkfQGpzyUeUojHS-RNV?tab=summary&timestamp=1543.0)
  - [GrowthX to check internally for earlier start date possibility](https://fathom.video/share/LTYuV8xxFTX8fUkfQGpzyUeUojHS-RNV?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Otto to sign by Friday if aiming for September 11th start](https://fathom.video/share/LTYuV8xxFTX8fUkfQGpzyUeUojHS-RNV?tab=summary&timestamp=1601.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up call if needed for additional questions](https://fathom.video/share/LTYuV8xxFTX8fUkfQGpzyUeUojHS-RNV?tab=summary&timestamp=1648.0)
